subcodes.title: Sahifiy-i-Shattiyih (the Book of the Tigris)
subcodes.first_line: The people talk constantly about this subject, but most of them comprehend not. Of the miracles mentioned, those which are ascribed to this humble one are fabrications contrived by impostors
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اکثرت القول فی ذلک ولکن الناس اکثرهم لایفقهون آنچه از ظهورات معجزات که
subcodes.subjects: @miracles and their interpretation, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @Word of God is its own standard, @spiritual transformation, @differences in human capacity, @symbolism, @transcendence; unknowability of God
